task_completion.description: Click the 'new journal' button in the sidebar to create a journal entry
task_completion.visual_evidence: The new journal button (calendar icon) in the sidebar is clicked, opening a tiddler editor with today's date as the title.

task_completion.description: The journal tiddler title contains today's date
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler title includes a date format like '11 February 2026' or '2026-02-11' or similar.
A tag pill labeled 'Journal' is visible in the tiddler's tag area.

task_completion.description: Write at least 50 words describing a productive work day
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler contains meaningful text about tasks completed, meetings attended, or progress made during a work day.
The journal tiddler is saved and displayed in view mode with the date title, Journal tag, and content visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the TiddlyWiki web interface in Firefox.

integrity.description: Verify a new tiddler was created (not editing an existing one)
integrity.visual_evidence: The tiddler creation process is visible, starting from the + or journal button click.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task creates a journal entry using TiddlyWiki's 'new journal' button. The title should contain today's date. Must have 'Journal' tag and 50+ words about a productive work day.
